Punched with the reality of their duties the police are not limited to dealing with [type of offence]. 

 

They also have to handle various other matters that require their attention such as [type of situation] at [location]. 

 

Offences are not the only things that are grasped by the police they also have to deal with [other matters] which can be just as challenging.
